{{Quote|This mission is dangerous, perhaps suicidal. I know you want the job, so it's yours.|Lawra Mers|<ref name="Black Ice (adventure)">[[Black Ice (adventure)|''Black Ice'']]</ref>}}
[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Lawra Mers''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] field mission commander tasked with coordinating dozens of strike teams and operatives out of the Alliance's [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]] HQ on [[Fangol]].

==Appearances==
*[[Black Ice (adventure)|''Black Ice'']] {{1st}}
